ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-02-2021 Continued To Mar-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom audio:
Jonathan Huber for Administrator.

Mr. Huber apologized for the delay, stating his filing was rejected, that he will file in the next couple of days and can file the bond forthwith. The Court noted the bond should have been increased already.

The status on close of estate is continued to March 23, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Status on increase of bond is set for March 23, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Appearance will be required on March 23, 2021 unless courtesy copies of above filings are received by the court by March 16, 2021.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
